codeReview.summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and current Card sources. The implementation changes the Card header from split `px-5 py-4` spacing to uniform `p-5`, which satisfies the 20px padding contract for titled cards, and the updated test now guards that exact regression.

summary: Pass. Commit `5dbe45e39cc467fb1a92f0000a8e42c555725c00` updates `src/components/ui/Card.vue` to use `p-5` on the header and extends `src/components/ui/Card.test.ts` to assert the old `px-5 py-4` classes are gone. I found no in-scope bugs or durable shared-state documentation gaps for this feature.
